name: SCC_PaymentDetailsReq
title: SCC_PaymentDetailsReq
syntax: void SCC_PaymentDetailsReq ( byte SessionID[], char ContractID[] )
description: The callback is called as soon as a Payment Details Request is received.

parameters.name: SessionID
parameters.description: 8-byte long SessionID of SCC connection, range: 0 – 0xFF FF FF FF FF FF FF FF.
